title: Read-only audit in /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public. Propose the minimal code change to make GHA task-completion backup usable from Claude/FUGUE as well as Codex. Focus on scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh, scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh, and scripts/local/run-kernel-task-compl...
summary_text: **Findings** 1. Hard-coded assistant blocks Claude/FUGUE attribution in wrapper paths. [kernel-run-complete.sh:115](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh:115), [kernel-milestone-record.sh:145](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh:145), [kernel-milestone-record.sh:194](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh:194) always pass `--assistant codex`. This is a lane-attribution mismatch in hybrid/Claude-main flows. 2. Backup runner is already assistant-agnostic for explicit records. [run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh:167](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh:167) supports `--assistant <name>`; workflow validation only requires non-empty string. 3. Coverage gap: wrapper tests do not assert assistant forwarding (only no-gha/title/summary behavior). [tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh), [tests/test-kernel-milestone-record.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-milestone-record.sh). **Minimal code change recommendation** 1. Add one env contract in wrappers: `KERNEL_TASK_COMPLETION_ASSISTANT` (default `codex` to avoid regression). 2. In both wrappers, normalize once (`lower+trim`, empty -> `codex`) and pass that to runner instead of hard-coded `codex`. 3. Keep runner interface unchanged (no breaking change required). Optional tiny doc tweak in usage text to mention acceptable assistant labels. Concrete behavior: - Default stays current: Codex. - Claude/FUGUE callers set one env before invoking wrappers: - `KERNEL_TASK_COMPLETION_ASSISTANT=claude` (or `fugue` if you want that label literally). **Suggested test updates (required)** 1. `tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh` Add assertions with runner stub log: - default call contains `--assistant codex` - env override call contains `--assistant claude` 2. `tests/test-kernel-milestone-record.sh` For both `phase` and `checkpoint` paths: - default contains `--assistant codex` - `KERNEL_TASK_COMPLETION_ASSISTANT=claude` contains `--assistant claude` 3. `tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup-fallback.sh` Add one explicit fallback record with `--assistant claude`; assert journal contains `"assistant":"claude"`. Existing targeted tests currently pass in baseline (no edits made).
